departments.Name: General
departments.Description: Provides comprehensive medical care for acute and chronic illnesses.

departments.Name: Andrology
departments.Description: Focuses on the male reproductive system and urological problems.

departments.Name: Bio Chemistry
departments.Description: Analyzes bodily fluids for diagnostic purposes.

departments.Name: Cardiology
departments.Description: Deals with disorders of the heart and the cardiovascular system.

departments.Name: Clinical Pathology
departments.Description: Involves laboratory analysis of bodily fluids and tissues.

departments.Name: Cyto-Pathology
departments.Description: Studies and diagnoses diseases on the cellular level.

departments.Name: Gastroenterology
departments.Description: Focuses on the digestive system and its disorders.

departments.Name: Haematology
departments.Description: Specializes in the study, diagnosis, and treatment of blood disorders.

departments.Name: Histo-Pathology
departments.Description: Examines tissues to study the manifestations of disease.

departments.Name: Microbiology
departments.Description: Studies microscopic organisms and infectious diseases.

departments.Name: Radiology
departments.Description: Uses medical imaging to diagnose and treat diseases.

departments.Name: Serology
departments.Description: Examines blood serum to detect antibodies and infections.

departments.Name: Anaesthetics
departments.Description: Administers anesthesia and manages pain during surgical procedures.

departments.Name: Diagnostic imaging (X-Ray)
departments.Description: Provides x-ray imaging services for diagnosis.

departments.Name: Ear nose and throat (ENT)
departments.Description: Specializes in conditions of the ear, nose, throat, and related structures.

departments.Name: General surgery
departments.Description: Performs various surgical procedures for a wide range of diseases.

departments.Name: Gynaecology
departments.Description: Focuses on the health of the female reproductive system.

departments.Name: Histo-Pathology
departments.Description: Examines tissues to study the manifestations of disease.

departments.Name: Nephrology
departments.Description: Deals with the diagnosis and treatment of kidney diseases.

departments.Name: Neurology
departments.Description: Specializes in disorders of the nervous system.

departments.Name: Nutrition and dietetics
departments.Description: Provides nutritional care and dietary guidance.

departments.Name: Obstetrics and gynaecology
departments.Description: Covers pregnancy, childbirth, and female reproductive health.

departments.Name: Oncology
departments.Description: Specializes in the diagnosis and treatment of cancer.

departments.Name: Ophthalmology
departments.Description: Deals with the anatomy, physiology, and diseases of the eye.

departments.Name: Orthopaedics
departments.Description: Focuses on conditions involving the musculoskeletal system.

departments.Name: Physiotherapy
departments.Description: Provides physical rehabilitation and mobility treatment.

departments.Name: Radiotherapy
departments.Description: Uses radiation therapy, primarily to treat cancer.

departments.Name: Rheumatology
departments.Description: Deals with joint diseases and autoimmune disorders.

departments.Name: Urology
departments.Description: Focuses on the urinary-tract system and male reproductive organs.

departments.Name: Pediatricians
departments.Description: Provides medical care for infants, children, and adolescents.

departments.Name: Physician
departments.Description: General medical practitioner providing comprehensive care.

departments.Name: General Physician(Lady)
departments.Description: Female general medical practitioner providing comprehensive care.

departments.Name: Phychaiatrist
departments.Description: Specializes in the diagnosis and treatment of mental illness.

departments.Name: Dermatologist
departments.Description: Focuses on conditions related to the skin, hair, and nails.

departments.Name: Plastic Surgeon
departments.Description: Performs reconstructive or cosmetic surgery.

departments.Name: Homeopathy
departments.Description: Provides alternative medicine based on homeopathic principles.

departments.Name: ENDOCRINOLOGY
departments.Description: Deals with the endocrine system, its diseases, and its specific secretions known as hormones.

departments.Name: Test84
departments.Description: Testing and experimental department.
